The '''D9 Runner light freighter''' was one of the first [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] designs created by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] after the rise of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].<ref name="sisar" />

It was an effective, inexpensive model but was eventually replaced by the [[D11]] Runner light freighter.<ref name="sisar" />
